case_title: SUSAN SANCHEZ VS. JON M LANDAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SUSAN SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JON M. LANDAS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $604.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, SUSAN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M
REMARK: INCOMPLETE PAYMENT AMOUNT RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT - LETTER TO DEFENDANT THIS DATE.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $379.40 RE 36334 FOR TRANSACTION W0520302D014 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO SUSAN SANCHEZ, DOC#1910503305, WARRANT #38206292, DATED MAY-11-2020
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED NOV-12-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M $303.40 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $373.40, COURT FINDS DEFENDANT DOG BIT PLAINTIFF IN BACK OF KNEE. PLAINTIFF IS OWED MEDICIAL EXPENSES OF $303.40. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LANDAS, JON M
